prompt: Fix the storage bucket listing that returns duplicates

turns.content:
<task>
Fix the bucket listing endpoint — it returns duplicate bucket entries when a bucket has multiple objects.
</task>

arguments.reasoning: Bug on lines 29-31: ListBuckets iterates over objects within each bucket, appending the bucket name once per object. Should just append once per bucket.

turns.content:
=== RUN   TestAddObject

=== RUN   TestListBuckets

=== RUN   TestListBucketsNoDuplicates
--- PASS: TestListBucketsNoDuplicates (0.00s)
PASS
ok  	gostorage/pkg/storage	0.002s

arguments.summary: Fixed ListBuckets() in pkg/storage/bucket.go — was iterating `for range b.Objects` causing one name per object instead of per bucket. Removed inner loop. Found file via glob (pkg/ not internal/). All 3 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Fixed duplicate bucket listing in pkg/storage/bucket.go. ListBuckets() had a nested loop over objects that duplicated bucket names. Removed inner loop. All 3 tests pass.
